rationale.R1.5: The output suggests some reorganization of the section, but does not provide a clear end-to-end plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not flag uncertainty for any claims and presents all results as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stays within scope but has one drift (e.g., discussing self-consistency analysis in the Experimental Setup section).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces some minor regressions (e.g., not providing clear numbers for Brier score improvement) and does not identify harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability and does not annotate changes with source and reason.
